name: litellm-balance-checker
description: Check your LiteLLM API key balance and usage directly from VS Code status bar

litellm-balance-checker.apiKey.description: Your LiteLLM API key to check balance for. If empty, the Authorization header will use the key being queried.

litellm-balance-checker.adminKey.description: Admin/proxy master key (if required) for querying key info. Leave empty if using the same key as apiKey.

litellm-balance-checker.username.description: LiteLLM UI username (for login-based auth). The extension will login and extract the embedded API key from the session.

litellm-balance-checker.password.description: LiteLLM UI password (for login-based auth). Stored in VS Code secret storage.

litellm-balance-checker.endpoint.description: The LiteLLM proxy endpoint URL (e.g., http://localhost:4000 or http://core.llm)

litellm-balance-checker.refreshInterval.description: Auto-refresh interval in seconds (minimum 5). Set to 0 to disable auto-refresh.

litellm-balance-checker.showKeyAlias.description: Show the key alias/name in the status bar next to the balance

litellm-balance-checker.showSpendLogs.description: Also display recent spend in the status bar (uses /spend/logs)

litellm-balance-checker.budgetWarningThr.description: Warning threshold percentage. When remaining budget falls below this % of max_budget, show a warning.

litellm-balance-checker.keyToQuery.description: Optional: Query a specific key (different from the auth key). If empty, queries the key used for authentication.
